name: Focus Quality Assessment and Ranking of Microscopy Image Series
description: You are a microscopy core facility technician evaluating the focus quality of a batch of 8 TIFF microscopy images located at ~/ImageJ_Data/focus_assessment/. Measure the Mean, Standard Deviation (StdDev), Min, and Max pixel intensities for at least 6 of the images. Record these statistics in a CSV file at ~/ImageJ_Data/results/focus_quality_report.csv with columns for Filename (or Label), Mean, StdDev, Min, and Max. Sort the entries by StdDev in descending order, as the standard deviation of pixel intensities serves as a proxy for image sharpness (higher StdDev indicates sharper focus).
